lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, you can change one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for this model to an unmodified 6.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- Einhyr Hearthguard
- Hearthkyn Warriors

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

profiles.name: Luck Has, Need Keeps, Toil Earns

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- EINHYR HEARTHGUARD
- HEARTHKYN WARRIORS

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- EINHYR HEARTHGUARD

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Charge move, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- HEARTHKYN WARRIORS

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, after this model’s unit fails a Battle-shock test, this model can use this ability. If it does, that unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this unit’s Grimnyr model is ever destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining CORV models are also destroyed. While embarking within a ^^**Transport^^** and while embarked within a ^^**Transport^^**, each CORV model takes up the space of 0 models.’

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Movement phase, this unit can repair one friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE or EXO-FRAME model within 3" of it. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds, or up to 3 lost wounds instead if this unit contains an Ironkyn Assistant. Each model can only be repaired once per turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- HEARTHKYN WARRIORS
- BRÔKHYR THUNDERKYN

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this unit’s Brôkhyr Iron‑master model is ever destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining E‑COG models are also destroyed. While embarking within a ^^**Transport^^** and while embarked within a ^^**Transport^^**, each E‑COG model takes up the space of 0 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a CHARACTER is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this unit’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is within 6" of any battlefield edge and is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY models. It cannot transport EXO-ARMOUR or EXO-FRAME models.
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one Hearthkyn Warriors unit from your army and split it into two units, each containing 5 models (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this Transport; the other can start the battle embarked within another Transport, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY models. Each EXO-ARMOUR model takes up the space of 2 models and each EXO-FRAME model takes up the space of 3 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".
